items.whyNotDiy: Why not just do it yourself?

hero.title:
Every journey starts

with a feeling.
hero.intro: Fully personalised itineraries for couples, families and solo travellers — designed around how you want to feel, not where the crowds go.

intro.heading: Every journey starts with a feeling
intro.p1: The world is vast, full of wonder. But information engulfs us — see this, do that, don’t miss this. It seems the more choice there is, the more overwhelmed we feel. And you’re never once asked the only question that matters: how do you want to feel?
intro.p2: That’s where we come in. bookit is a tailor-made travel studio in North Macedonia that designs fully personalised itineraries — not templates, not off-the-shelf tours. Whether you’re a couple seeking adventure, a family exploring together, or a solo traveller chasing something extraordinary, we craft every detail around you.
intro.p3: Since {year} we’ve planned journeys across the Balkans, the Mediterranean and beyond — trusted to get the details right, from the first idea to the moment you’re home. No planning fees, no crowds, no compromises.
intro.p4: So let’s begin. Let’s do something remarkable.

browser.empty: No journeys match that feeling yet — tell us what you have in mind and we'll craft one.

footer.description: Tailor-made luxury travel from North Macedonia, designed entirely around how you want to feel. No templates. No planning fees.

enquiry.sentTitle: Your enquiry is on its way
enquiry.sentBody: We’ll match you with a bookit travel expert and be in touch within 24 hours to set up a time to talk — over email, phone or video, whatever suits you. In the meantime, you can reach us any time on <phone></phone>.
enquiry.title: Let’s plan something remarkable
enquiry.intro: Tell us a little about the trip you have in mind. There are no planning fees and no obligation — just the start of a conversation.
enquiry.assurance1: Matched with a bookit travel expert who knows the ground
enquiry.assurance2: We’ll talk it through — email, phone or video call
enquiry.whereLabel: Where would you like to go?
enquiry.notesPlaceholder: How do you want to feel? Who’s it for? Anything that would make it yours…
enquiry.newsletter: Keep me posted with occasional travel inspiration. No spam, unsubscribe any time.
enquiry.finePrint: No planning fees · no obligation · reply within 24 hours
